---
title: "test_norn_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_norn_empire.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.63
---

## Intent
The `test_norn_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestNornEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_plan, test_scan_valid_task, test_scan_completed_task, test_mark_complete. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestNornEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_plan, test_scan_valid_task, test_scan_completed_task, test_mark_complete. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)

### Exports
- `TestNornEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_no_plan`
- `test_scan_valid_task`
- `test_scan_completed_task`
- `test_mark_complete`
